title: Asset
description: An industrial asset monitored by Baker Hughes Cordant platform.

assetType.description: Classification of the asset (e.g., compressor, pump, turbine).

facilityId.description: Identifier of the facility where the asset is located.

location.description: Geographic or plant location of the asset.

status.description: Current operational status of the asset.

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp of the last data update for this asset.

tags.description: User-defined tags for organizing and filtering assets.
